expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated in the report
expectations.evidence: The report summary table shows '전체 (33항목)' and the detailed results table lists items 1-33 covering all four principles: 인식의 용이성 (9), 운용의 용이성 (15), 이해의 용이성 (7), 견고성 (2).

expectations.text: Semantic HTML review section is included in the report
expectations.evidence: report.html contains a '시맨틱 HTML 검토' section with 8 sub-items (랜드마크 요소, 섹션 구조, 대화형 요소, 목록 구조, 표현용 태그, 폼 그룹, 기타 시맨틱 요소, 브레드크럼 구조). The CSV also includes rows prefixed 시맨틱-1 through 시맨틱-8.
Issues reference specific file locations such as 'page.tsx:83', 'StatsCard.tsx:10-18', 'Navbar.tsx:38-40', 'page.tsx:59', 'page.tsx:63', 'Navbar.tsx:59-72', 'page.tsx:72-74'.

expectations.text: report.html file is generated in outputs directory
expectations.evidence: report.html exists in the outputs directory and contains a complete HTML accessibility report with 570 lines.

expectations.text: report.csv file is generated in outputs directory
expectations.evidence: report.csv exists in the outputs directory with 42 rows (header + 33 KWCAG items + 8 semantic HTML items).

expectations.text: Detected missing alt attribute on img in dashboard/page.tsx
expectations.evidence: Item 1 (적절한 대체 텍스트) marked as ❌ with description: 'page.tsx:83 — 에 alt 속성 없음. 의미 있는 이미지(프로모션 배너)에 대체 텍스트 미제공.'

expectations.text: Detected icon buttons without aria-label in dashboard/page.tsx
expectations.evidence: Item 23 (레이블과 네임) marked as ❌ identifying 'page.tsx:59 — <button data-testid="btn-refresh"><svg>: aria-label 없음' and 'page.tsx:63 — <button data-testid="btn-settings"><svg>: aria-label 없음'.

expectations.text: Detected duplicate id='stat-card' issue in StatsCard.tsx
expectations.evidence: Item 32 (마크업 오류 방지) marked as ❌ with: 'StatsCard.tsx:13 — id="stat-card" 하드코딩. 3개 인스턴스 렌더링 시 DOM에 id="stat-card"가 3개 존재. Playwright로 document.querySelectorAll("#stat-card").length === 3 확인.'

expectations.text: Lighthouse-mapped items show verdict method as Lighthouse, not 정적분석
expectations.evidence: Lighthouse-mapped items use Lighthouse as verdict method: Item 8 (명도 대비) = Lighthouse, Item 19 (적절한 링크 텍스트) = Lighthouse, Item 25 (기본 언어 표시) = Lighthouse, Item 29 (레이블 제공) = Lighthouse.

expectations.text: Browser-target items (A-10, A-11, A-33) show verdict method as Playwright, not 판정불가
expectations.evidence: All three browser-target items use Playwright as verdict method: Item 10 (키보드 사용 보장) = Playwright, Item 11 (초점 이동과 표시) = Playwright, Item 33 (웹 애플리케이션 접근성) = Playwright. None show 판정불가.
